raw_text: sep 10 25, 52 min. Warmup: scales d major + d minor, weak fingrs, mirror scales. Started reading chopin fantasie impromtu op66 in c# minor, hs slow. Also looked at chopin etude op25 no 2 in F major, just sight reading the first page.
11/09/25 – 45min. Warmup arpegios, d# minor scale. FI op 66 by chopin: bars 1-8 RH only, focus on rythm + evenness. Etude op25 no 2 by chopin: LH patterns, 60bpm. Felt tired today.

12 sept 2025, 50 minutes. Warmup: weak fingers, mirror fingers, scales g major. Worked on fantasie impromptu (choppin) bars 1–16 hs, then ht very slow. Chopin etude 25/2: reading through again, messy but improving.
13-09-25, 48min. Warmup only today: scales c major, c minor, arpegios, octvs. Improv on A minor for 10 min. No pieces today.

sept 14 25, 55 min. Warmup: d major, f# minor scales, mirror scales. FI op66 by chopin: bars 8–20, hs 72bpm, ht 40bpm. Chopin etude 25 no 2: worked on RH flow, 80bpm. Sightreading bach sinfonia 11 (JS bach) just for fun.
15/09/25, 46 min. Warmup: c# minor scale, weak LH. Chopin fantasie impromptu: bars 20–28 hs, focusing on LH clarity. Chopin etude op25 no2: slow practice, 70bpm.
16 sept 25 – 49min. Warmup arps in g major. FI op66 by chopin: ht super slow, bars 1–12. Etude 25/2 by chopin: RH flow exercises. Felt good today.
17-09-25, 40 min. Warmup only: scales e major, e minor, mirror fingers. Sightreading some bach inventions. No chopin today.
